name: screeps-server-mods-monorepo
description: Monorepo for Screeps private server mods

scripts.subtree:update:engine: git subtree pull --prefix packages/engine https://github.com/screeps/engine.git master --squash
scripts.subtree:update:common: git subtree pull --prefix packages/common https://github.com/screeps/common.git master --squash
scripts.subtree:update:driver: git subtree pull --prefix packages/driver https://github.com/screeps/driver.git master --squash
scripts.subtree:update:launcher: git subtree pull --prefix packages/launcher https://github.com/screeps/launcher.git master --squash
scripts.subtree:update:storage: git subtree pull --prefix packages/storage https://github.com/screeps/storage.git master --squash
scripts.subtree:update:all: npm run subtree:update:engine && npm run subtree:update:common && npm run subtree:update:backend && npm run subtree:update:driver && npm run subtree:update:launcher && npm run subtree:update:storage
